name: Iso11783IL_PDDGetValue
title: Iso11783IL_PDDGetValue
tables: Deprecated Function This function is deprecated and has been replaced by Iso11783IL_PDDGetValueRaw, Iso11783IL_PDDGetValuePhysical.
float Iso11783IL_PDDGetValue( dbSignal signal, dword elementNumber ); // form 1
float Iso11783IL_PDDGetValue( dword ddi, dword elementNumber ); // form 2
float Iso11783IL_PDDGetValue( dbNode implement, dword ddi, dword elementNumber ); // form 3
The function returns the value of a process variable.
signal signal from the database The attribute DDI must be defined for the signal. The signal must be defined in the same database as the node!
implement Simulation node to apply the function.
value of the process variable, 0 if the variable is not defined

Example char text[256];value = Iso11783IL_PDDGetValue( PD::AppRateSignal, 0 );if (Iso11783IL_PDDGetLastError () != 0) { Iso11783IL_PDDGetLastErrorText ( elCount(text), text ); write( "ERROR: %s", text);}
